title: Creamy Kenyan Fideo Noodle Stir Fry
description: A fusion dish combining Kenyan flavors with a creamy fideo noodle stir fry. Serve as a quick and easy dinner option.
instructions: 1. Cook the Kenyan fideo noodles according to the package instructions.
2. In a pan, heat the xtra virgin olive oil over medium heat and add the sliced onion and bell pepper.
3. Cook for 3-4 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
4. Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
5. Stir in the creamy sauce and chili flakes.
6. Return the cooked noodles to the pan and toss with the creamy sauce mixture.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
